prompt_template:
# Project: Mini E-Commerce API ¡ª Session 1 of 3

Build the foundation of a mini e-commerce REST API using Flask:

1. Create `app.py` with Flask app
2. Implement `POST /products` ¡ª create a product with {name, price, stock}
3. Implement `GET /products` ¡ª list all products
4. Implement `GET /products/<id>` ¡ª get single product
5. Store products in an in-memory list (will be upgraded to DB in session 2)
6. Add input validation: name required, price > 0, stock >= 0
7. Write `test_app.py` with pytest tests for all endpoints
8. Create `DESIGN.md` documenting your API design decisions

KEY: Remember your design choices ¡ª in session 2 you will add user auth and switch to a database. Your DESIGN.md will help you maintain context.
